NIBE signs technology licensing agreement with Sig Sauer

Press Release · 20 June 2026

NIBE Limited announced today that it has signed a technology licensing agreement with Sig Sauer of the USA for the local production of small arms, including assault rifles, at its facility in Maharashtra.

Under the licence, NIBE Defence will manufacture rifles for the Indian armed forces and potential export customers. The company said the agreement deepens its small arms portfolio and supports indigenisation goals.

NIBE has also been expanding partnerships across the defence sector, including earlier collaborations in the missiles and air defence domain.
